problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
